CustomField.description: Repo-relative path to the anonymous-Apex loader script that primes this dataset. The cumulusci.yml task load_feature_data executes this via AnonymousApexTask. Default is the legacy whole-org demo loader; per-feature scripts live under scripts/feature-data/.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Repo-relative path to the anonymous-Apex loader (e.g. scripts/feature-data/invoice_generation.apex).
CustomField.label: Apex Script Path
